args.value: CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c CHECK (c0 AS a)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0

leadingComments: -- Test that CONSTRAINT CHECK expressions with aliases are formatted consistently
-- CONSTRAINT with alias in CHECK expression (parentheses required)

args.value: CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c CHECK (c0 AS a)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0
CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c0 CHECK (c0 AS a), CONSTRAINT c1 CHECK (c0 > 0)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0

leadingComments: -- CONSTRAINT with alias followed by another constraint

args.value: CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c CHECK (c0 AS a), c1 String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0

leadingComments: -- CONSTRAINT with alias followed by column

args.value: CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c CHECK (c0 + 1 AS a)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0

leadingComments: -- More complex expression with alias in CONSTRAINT

args.value: CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c ASSUME (c0 > 0 AS positive)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0
CREATE TABLE t (c0 Int64, CONSTRAINT c ASSUME (c0 > 0 AS positive)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY c0
